overview: AIPSA ERP is a premium enterprise SaaS platform for the All India Private School Association, combining Sales CRM, School ERP, HR & Payroll, Parent/Student Portals, Finance & Billing, and Analytics into a single unified national-level platform.
features: Super Admin Dashboard with KPI tiles, state-wise analytics, revenue tracking
Sales CRM with lead pipeline, GST invoicing, commission tracking
School ERP with student records, attendance, exams, fees, class management
Teacher & HR Portal with payroll, leave management, performance reports
Parent & Student Portals with fee payment, report cards, homework
Finance & Billing with subscription plans, GST invoices, renewal tracking
Analytics Center with charts for school growth, sales trends, state comparisons
Premium UI with dark mode, collapsible sidebar, glassmorphism widgets, mobile responsive
